05 = Helper - Modified Dependence/Supervision (Subject 100%), 06 = No Helper/Modified Independence (Device), 07 = No Helper/Complete Independence (Timely, Safely)
101 _39DA DRSG_UPR_ADMSN_CD 39Da) Self-Care: Dressing-Upper: Admission CHAR 2 A score indicating the patient's ability to dress the upper body at admission. Dressing the upper body includes dressing and undressing above the waist, as well as applying and removing a prosthesis or orthosis when applicable. 00 = Activity did not occur,
